title: Capitalism through ads
content:
news sharing tv channels turned into an ad showing privately funded propaganda agencies. unlike the old times they dont hold any social responsibility , no accountability , just full time propaganda.

On the online space we are made to pay for blocking ads on users end by subscription model. where the companies hold the copyright for the content user consumes. same method applies to the offline media but the sad part is your is not allowed the luxury of having ads blocked.


contradictions of capitalist model- yet making humans bound to the system to a point of no return!
